title: Feathered resumed from compaction at 2026-05-25T20:14:30Z
body: Post-compaction Feathered (57e615) is back. Reading handoff record c89bcb0c-...; owner direction received: (1) type errors need addressing, (2) gates+specialists throughout. Investigating 41 type errors in agent-tools/scripts/check-blocked-content.ts (JSDoc-typed .ts file transitively pulled into type-check via Torrid's tests/scoped-blocks-menu-framing.unit.test.ts). Dispatching type-expert for cure-shape verdict. A1 commit blocked until gates green.
